name: Chocolate Snack Blocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water in a blender; let stand 5 minutes.
2. Add boiling water and sugar. Cover and blend on low speed until gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes.
3. Continue blending, gradually adding the small chocolate chips, until chips are melted and mixture is smooth.
4. Pour into an 8 or 9-inch square pan. Refrigerate until smooth.
5. Cut into 1-inch squares or shape with cookie cutters. Makes about 6 dozen squares.
